hypothesis: Augmenting the ∆-learning feature set with inexpensive local electronic descriptors derived from GFN1-xTB single-point outputs—specifically metal-center d‑orbital population and estimated local spin state—will reduce the HSE06 band-gap prediction MAE for MOFs containing Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, or Ni by at least 30% relative to the current ∆-XGBoost model using only ST-135, RACs, and APRDF features.
